reasoning: As of June 5, 2025, Francis Suarez has not announced a candidacy for Florida governor. The deadline for this question is July 1, 2025, leaving only 26 days. While Suarez has spent over a year floating the idea of running for governor and continued to say he was 'considering' it as recently as May 2, 2025, he faces an insurmountable obstacle: Donald Trump emphatically endorsed Rep. Byron Donalds for the position on February 20, 2025. In his May 2 remarks, Suarez explicitly acknowledged this reality, noting that 'The president has weighed in on the governor's race in a way that makes it hard' and suggesting there may be 'other ways to serve.' Given the extremely short timeline remaining and his own public admission of the race's difficulty following Trump's endorsement, it is highly unlikely he will launch a gubernatorial campaign against Trump's chosen candidate before July 1.
